summary: Milestone 6 satisfies the feature plan: ITacticalUI provides the intended non-wx tactical boundary, WXTacticalUI adds the wx-backed adapter without rewiring the live tactical runtime, GUI build wiring includes the adapter, and merged tactical tests cover the additive boundary and runtime non-rewiring expectations.

warning: include/tactical/ITacticalUI.h omits repository-standard Doxygen @author and @date tags for a new production header.
note: No feature-level integration gaps or missed Milestone 6 plan items were found.
Subtask 4 acceptance is satisfied by the merged ITacticalUI boundary and WXTacticalUI adapter tests while runtime tactical classes remain on the direct-calling path.
